nodes.title: Knowledge Graph
nodes.body: Graph of typed nodes and edges capturing what we know. Mindmap itself is one; see [[mindmap]] and the [[transformer]] literature it can index.

nodes.title: Wiki-link
nodes.body: A `[[node-id]]` reference inside a node body. Auto-creates a `mentions` edge, stubbing the target if missing (org-roam behavior).

nodes.title: Mindmap
nodes.body: This tool: stdlib-only Python CLI + web UI over SQLite for local research notes.

nodes.title: force-graph
nodes.body: Canvas force-directed graph renderer used by the mindmap web UI (2D mode).

nodes.title: Research Wiki Home
nodes.body: Team Confluence space landing page for research notes.

nodes.title: Attention Is All You Need
nodes.body: Introduced the Transformer architecture: attention-only sequence transduction, no recurrence.

nodes.title: Jane Doe
nodes.body: Research engineer; maintains the wiki and [[force-graph]] integration.

nodes.title: Research Team
nodes.body: Owns the research wiki and reading list.
